name: int_nan_now_claimed
description: Phase 7C CLAIMED (CR-B1 close): int target, 'nan'. BAML's int coercer casts NaN as i64 -> 0 (Rust's saturating cast). native now reproduces that TOTAL saturating cast (i64FromF64Round; LIVE-CAPTURED: nan/NaN/-nan -> 0), so it CLAIMS this with no BAML fallback. want captured LIVE from BAML final parse.
